title: chamaecytisus ratisbonensis
intro: Chamaecytisus ratisbonensis, also known as Ratisbon broom or Ratisbon pea, is a type of shrub in the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Chamaecytisus ratisbonensis is prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, and its roots and stems can be used to create infusions and other preparations.
